sections.title: What is a purchase order?
sections.body: A purchase order (PO) is a document a buyer sends to a supplier to formally request goods or services at an agreed price. It lists the items, quantities, unit prices, taxes, delivery terms and a PO number the supplier quotes back on their invoice. The PO becomes a binding commitment once the supplier accepts, and it controls spend by requiring approval before money goes out.

sections.title: Raise, approve, receive, match
sections.body: Paper & Pen runs the full procure-to-pay flow so every order is approved, tracked and matched.
items: Raise a PO from a low-stock alert or from scratch
Route it for internal approval before it is sent
Send to the supplier by WhatsApp or email
Receive goods against the PO and update stock
Convert to a supplier bill and match to the PO and delivery

sections.title: Control spend before it happens
sections.body: Purchase orders move spend control to before the money leaves, not after. With approvals, delivery tracking and three-way matching between the PO, the goods received and the supplier bill, you catch overbilling and short deliveries before you pay. That discipline scales from a single buyer to a full procurement team.

faqs.q: What is a purchase order for?
faqs.a: It formally requests goods or services from a supplier at an agreed price, controls spend through approval, and gives the supplier a reference to quote on their invoice.
Yes. Creating, approving and tracking purchase orders is free forever on Paper & Pen.

faqs.q: Can I approve a PO before it is sent?
faqs.a: Yes. Route purchase orders for internal approval so nothing is ordered without the right sign-off.

faqs.q: Can I match a PO to a supplier bill?
faqs.a: Yes. Convert a received PO into a supplier bill and match it three-way against the order and the goods received to catch discrepancies.

faqs.q: Does receiving a PO update my stock?
faqs.a: With the optional Inventory module, receiving goods against a PO increases stock levels automatically.

ctaSub: Create a free Paper & Pen workspace, raise approved purchase orders, and match them to bills automatically.
